stat_block.text: A *vitalizing* weapon pulses with vital energy, dealing an extra 1d6 persistent vitality damage to undead. On a critical hit, the undead is also enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.name: Vitalizing (Greater)
variants.text: Increase the persistent vitality damage to 2d6. On a critical hit, the undead creature is enfeebled 1 and stupefied 1 as long as it has the persistent damage from this rune.
